questionHtml: Contrast the actions of non-competitive and competitive inhibitors of an enzyme and state their effects on the maximum rate of reaction, Vmax, and the Michaelis–Menten constant, Km.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for each action.

Award [1] for any two effects stated correctly.

Award [2 max] if both actions and effects are switched to incorrect inhibitor types.

meta.title: Contrast the actions of non-competitive and competitive inhibitors of an enzyme and state their effects on the maximum rate of reaction, Vmax, and the Michaelis–Menten constant, Km
